when the owner updates the local (Unichain) reference pool."},"StrategyUpdated(uint256,uint256,bytes32)":{"notice":"Emitted when the AI agent updates strategy parameters."},"SwapObserved(uint256,address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted inside react() when a swap is processed."}},"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Comprehensive Foundry test for the YieldScout Reactive Contract. \u2500\u2500 Test Architecture Note \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 YieldScout is a Reactive Network contract. Its `react()` function requires `vmMode == true` (i.e., running inside the ReactVM). In a normal Foundry test, the system contract at 0xfffFfF is NOT deployed, so `_detectVm()` sets vmMode=true. This means `react()` is directly callable in tests \u2014 which is exactly what we want. However, `subscribe()` calls in the constructor are gated by `!vmMode`, so they are skipped when vmMode=true \u2014 avoiding any call to the undeployed system contract. \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 Test Cases:   1.  testConstructorState              \u2014 Verify initial state is set correctly.   2.  testReactLocalSwapAccumulates     \u2014 react() updates localCumulativeVolume for local pool.   3.  testReactSourceSwapAccumulates    \u2014 react() updates cumulativeVolume for source pool.   4.  testNoTriggerBelowThreshold       \u2014 No Callback when source yield < threshold.   5.  testNoTriggerBelowMinSwapCount    \u2014 No Callback when source pool has < 3 swaps.   6.  testCallbackEmittedAboveThreshold \u2014 Callback emitted when source yield >> local.   7.  testSwapObservedEmitted           \u2014 SwapObserved event emitted on every react().   8.  testUpdateStrategy                \u2014 AI agent can update yield threshold + confidence.   9.  testUpdateStrategyOnlyOwner       \u2014 Random address cannot call updateStrategy.   10. testUpdateLocalPool              \u2014 Owner can update local pool reference.   11. testYieldVelocityComparison      \u2014 View function returns correct source/local ratio.   12. testWouldTriggerRebalance        \u2014 View predicts rebalance correctly.   13. testTransferOwnership            \u2014 Ownership transfer works correctly.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"test/YieldScout.t.sol":"YieldScoutTest"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"none"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@ensdomains/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/v4-core/node_modules/@ensdomains/",":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/v4-core/lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":@openzeppelin/uniswap-hooks/=lib/uniswap-hooks/",":@uniswap/v4-core/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/v4-core/",":@uniswap/v4-periphery/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/v4-periphery/",":ds-test/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/v4-core/lib/forge-std/lib/ds-test/src/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-gas-snapshot/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/v4-periphery/lib/permit2/lib/forge-gas-snapshot/src/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":hardhat/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/v4-core/node_modules/hardhat/",":hookmate/=lib/hookmate/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":openzeppelin/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":permit2/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/v4-periphery/lib/permit2/",":solmate/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/v4-core/lib/solmate/",":uniswap-hooks/=lib/uniswap-hooks/src/",":v4-core/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/v4-core/",":v4-periphery/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/v4-periphery/"]},"sources":{"lib/forge-std/src/Base.sol":{"keccak256":"0xa3735a6618a3014e42bb4329ad143e3b2c59cd95094350202e4c4a06c9d585dd","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://eef9db48d94726ec3d3fa3a84a8d520903705190f7ee7a04a065335a6aeeac4d","dweb:/ipfs/QmSWmNny7TkzyqRPjGdpERAJuBwwznrGPLUqS4DZy5fX5z"]},"lib/forge-std/src/StdAssertions.sol":{"keccak256":"0xd8eec16034b53b52c90a3d720e121ce7d30d64cc57d854db7d817d5b382dda43","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://612780755e32668c7e3b747d94d16c7291101144e084dd9ee563f071711e99e3","dweb:/ipfs/QmQgtFJXEmDtSHT7tZQTMbb6PCDpq5UDYFvrBnWk1Xo2SY
